ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "short_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected (in YYYY-MM-DD format) */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day the data was collected */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature measurement */,
  "rhum" REAL /* Relative humidity measurement */,
  "sol_rad" REAL /* Solar radiation measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input, API) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data (e.g., valid, suspect, missing) */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, solar radiation) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 checksum for file integrity verification */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used to access the data (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., trend analysis, correlation analysis) */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., published, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was calibrated */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* User who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was maintained */,
  "maintenance_result" TEXT /* Result of the maintenance */,
  "maintained_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
